rag_rules: Preserve the AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component type or implementation scopes
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes, and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use visible identifiers from the current target component or implementation, and do not introduce new identifiers without explicit whitelist
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component structure from the input AADL model
Do not modify the AADL architecture; only insert AGREE annex blocks in valid scopes
Preserve existing subcomponents, connections, and ports in the target component or implementation
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes, and implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new identifiers without explicit whitelist
Do not modify the AADL architecture; only insert AGREE annex blocks in valid scopes
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
